class.name: PlayFabStatistics
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.statistics[/code]. This service wraps client-safe PlayFab statistic definition and entity statistic APIs from the GDK PlayFab Services SDK. Methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser], accept an optional request [Dictionary] using snake_case PlayFab field names, and return a completion [Signal] that emits [PlayFabResult]. Result payloads are converted to Godot Dictionaries and Arrays.

method.name: create_statistic_definition_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFStatisticsCreateStatisticDefinition[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: delete_statistic_definition_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFStatisticsDeleteStatisticDefinition[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: delete_statistics_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFStatisticsDeleteStatistics[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_statistic_definition_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFStatisticsGetStatisticDefinition[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_statistics_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFStatisticsGetStatistics[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_statistics_for_entities_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFStatisticsGetStatisticsForEntities[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: increment_statistic_version_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFStatisticsIncrementStatisticVersion[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: list_statistic_definitions_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFStatisticsListStatisticDefinitions[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: update_statistic_definition_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFStatisticsUpdateStatisticDefinition[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: update_statistics_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFStatisticsUpdateStatistics[/code] for [param user]. The canonical request shape is [code]{"statistics": [{"name": "high_score", "scores": ["1234"]}]}[/code], where [code]statistics[/code] is an [Array] of [Dictionary] entries and each [code]scores[/code] value is serialized as a decimal [String]. Individual statistic entries also accept optional [code]metadata[/code] and [code]version[/code] keys. The completed result data is a [Dictionary] returned by the PlayFab SDK.
